title: April 18th, 2022
body:
thoughts

i make divinatory, constellatory, revelatory art

brandi

let's think about roam trail work i can do to support this relationship

lyrics

i buy coffee on the way to buy coffee

cuz the first one's a drive thru by my house

plus who the fuck gonna stop me

it's nice out, i want things

shopping

push pins

playlists

body politickin
